title: micromeria lepida subsp. lepida
intro: Micromeria lepida subsp. lepida is a subspecies of the Micromeria genus, a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Micromeria lepida subsp. lepida include relief from digestive issues, reduced inflammation, and antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
